Game.Name: Super Formation Soccer 95 della Serie A (Japan) (UCC Xaqua Version)
Game.plot: Super Formation Soccer 95: della Serie A is a Sports game, developed and published by Human Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Super Formation Soccer 95 della Serie A Information* On the Exhibition Player entry screen, whilst holidng X,L and R on the second controller press A. If the lowest entry on the screen turns into hiragana you have been successful. You can now select the entry on the top-right of the Team Selection screen and you will be able to use 3 hidden teams.* Whilst dribbling if you press twice quickly in the direction you are moving the player will jump.* In an Offensive Game in Practice Mode, if you press Select during a Throw in, Corner Kick, Goal Kick etc the remaining time will change to 45 minutes.* If you press Select on the Team Selection screen, you can select 'Random Team'. If you press X, you will see some info about the teams.* If you pause the game during a match and press B the players' names will disappear. If you repeat this, their names will reappear.* Put the cursor over the Situation Mode's 'Cleared' entry and press A and X as the same time. You will be able to select Reverse Mode which has different conditions required to clear it.
Game.Notes: Super Formation Soccer 95: della Serie A is a Sports game, developed and published by Human Entertainment, which was released in Japan in 1995.
